title:
Data standards
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
- Mandated data standards Mandated data standards, their importance, the current mandated standards, the topics proposed for future mandate, the process for selecting topics, and who mandates them.

### Mandated data standards
Mandated data standards, their importance, the current mandated standards, the topics proposed for future mandate, the process for selecting topics, and who mandates them.
- The process for selecting and mandating standards We describe the process for mandating data standards, including the groups involved in mandating standards, the proposed topics and candidates, how you can engage with the process, why it was changed, and compliance with the previous standards.

### The process for selecting and mandating standards
We describe the process for mandating data standards, including the groups involved in mandating standards, the proposed topics and candidates, how you can engage with the process, why it was changed, and compliance with the previous standards.
- Register of government mandated data standards A definitive list of approved mandated data standards. Date of birth data mandated standard The mandated standard to be used to format date of birth data for sharing purposes. Person name mandated standard The mandated standard to be used to format person name for sharing purposes. Street address mandated data standard The mandated standard to be used to format street address information for sharing purposes.

### Register of government mandated data standards
A definitive list of approved mandated data standards.
- Date of birth data mandated standard The mandated standard to be used to format date of birth data for sharing purposes.

#### Date of birth data mandated standard
The mandated standard to be used to format date of birth data for sharing purposes.
- Person name mandated standard The mandated standard to be used to format person name for sharing purposes.

#### Person name mandated standard
The mandated standard to be used to format person name for sharing purposes.
- Street address mandated data standard The mandated standard to be used to format street address information for sharing purposes.

#### Street address mandated data standard
The mandated standard to be used to format street address information for sharing purposes.
